summary: #742 supersedes only the stale claim that executable CLI, read-demo FastAPI/Postgres process behavior, and live Docker publication execution belong inside extracted core. Core keeps public HTTP/MCP, package/import, configuration, secret, transport, and verification contract evidence; executable clients, server processes, and interpreter/runtime Docker effects remain handoffs.
